creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to russo from comment #0)

Thanks for reporting.
Upstream rerolled the 2.10 tarball but we have 2.11 in the ports tree now.
And I noticed that upstream rerolled 2.11 again!

(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #1)

% tar -vtf /home/poudriere/data/packages/11-default/All/lcms2-2.11.txz | grep pdf
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel 3048325 Jun 17 04:09 /usr/local/share/doc/lcms2/LittleCMS2.11 API.pdf
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel 1616868 Jun 17 04:09 /usr/local/share/doc/lcms2/LittleCMS2.11 Plugin API.pdf
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel 1898383 Jun 17 04:09 /usr/local/share/doc/lcms2/LittleCMS2.11 tutorial.pdf
